message.content:
(1) PASS - The ESGic logo (shield with laurel wreath + ESGic text) is large and clearly visible at the top of the card.  
(2) PASS - There is no separate 'ESGic' text heading below the logo.  
(3) PASS - There is no 'École Supérieure de Gestion, d'Informatique et de Comptabilité' subtitle text.  
(4) PASS - The logo appears prominent (around 140px).  

At the top of the card, there is a single ESGic logo (shield with laurel wreath + ESGic text) centered, with no additional text elements below it.
